requirement: A universal search shall find organizations, contacts, leads, opportunities, tickets, onboarding cases and message subjects using normalized indexed fields.
acceptance_evidence: Results are permission-filtered before display; no cross-scope count leakage.

requirement: Every operational detail page shall show status, owner, next action, due time, key risk/score and recent history above the fold.
acceptance_evidence: A user can identify accountable person and immediate next step without changing tabs.

requirement: The customer 360 timeline shall use a normalized event model with filters for messages, calls, notes, tasks, stage changes, support, onboarding, feedback, files and automation.
acceptance_evidence: Events remain chronological, attributable and deep-linkable.

requirement: Mutating forms shall preserve entered values and show field-level errors; destructive actions require clear impact text.
acceptance_evidence: No validation failure discards valid user input.

requirement: Long operations shall be queued and represented by a job status page; the initiating request shall return promptly.
acceptance_evidence: No export, archive, import, bulk recalculation or mail batch blocks an HTTP request.

requirement: List views shall provide saved filters, column choice, pagination, bulk selection limits and export according to permission.
acceptance_evidence: A saved view records owner, visibility and versioned filter definition.

requirement: Mobile layouts shall prioritize task completion, customer context, call/email actions and timeline entry.
acceptance_evidence: Core daily workflows pass responsive testing at 360 CSS pixels.

requirement: All status colors shall be paired with text/icon meaning and meet accessible contrast.
acceptance_evidence: No state is communicated by color alone.

requirement: Optimistic-lock conflicts shall show what changed and allow safe refresh/reapply.
acceptance_evidence: One user cannot silently overwrite another user’s newer edit.

requirement: The UI shall distinguish internal notes, customer-visible messages and portal-visible files with persistent labels.
acceptance_evidence: A visibility mistake requires explicit user override and is audit logged.

requirement: Administrative configuration shall show effective version, activation time, dependency impact and rollback option.
acceptance_evidence: A configuration change cannot be mistaken for immediate retroactive effect.

requirement: Keyboard navigation, visible focus, labels, error summaries and semantic headings shall meet WCAG 2.2 AA for applicable screens.
acceptance_evidence: Automated and manual accessibility tests pass release thresholds.

requirement: Each state machine shall define allowed transitions, required fields, required permission, entry action, exit action and SLA.
acceptance_evidence: Invalid transitions are rejected server-side with an actionable explanation.

requirement: Stage histories shall be append-only and store effective time, actor, reason and prior/new value.
acceptance_evidence: Reports can calculate velocity and reconstruct state at a historical date.

requirement: Configuration changes shall create a new version and shall not reinterpret prior history.
acceptance_evidence: Historical records retain the stage/version valid at the event time.

requirement: An active lifecycle record shall require an owner and next action except where a documented waiting state supplies a wake-up date.
acceptance_evidence: Nightly integrity checks create exceptions for violations.

requirement: Waiting-for-customer states shall pause only the applicable SLA clock and shall preserve total elapsed time.
acceptance_evidence: SLA reports distinguish company time, customer-wait time and total elapsed time.

requirement: Terminal states shall require an outcome reason and may trigger retention/feedback/hand-off workflows.
acceptance_evidence: A record cannot close without configured outcome data.

requirement: Reopening shall retain the prior terminal event and create a new active interval.
acceptance_evidence: Reopened support and commercial records remain analytically distinct.

requirement: Automations shall evaluate the committed transition event, not uncommitted form input.
acceptance_evidence: No workflow is triggered when the database transaction rolls back.

requirement: Staff account creation is invitation-only and available only to authorized administrators.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: An invitation has intended email, role, expiry, single-use token and issuer; no public staff registration route exists.
acceptance_evidence: Attempted self-registration is unavailable; expired/reused tokens fail; invitation acceptance is audited.

requirement: Portal identities are created only from an authorized contact and organization relationship.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Portal access is bound server-side to contact and organization; reassignment requires approval.
acceptance_evidence: Cross-organization object IDs return no data and generate a security event.

requirement: Usernames use normalized verified email addresses while internal immutable user IDs preserve history.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Email changes require re-verification and do not rewrite historical authorship.
acceptance_evidence: Old/new addresses, actor and verification time appear in audit.

requirement: Password policy shall use Django-compatible strong hashing and compromised/common-password controls.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Scrypt is preferred when runtime support passes preflight; otherwise PBKDF2-SHA256 with approved iteration settings.
acceptance_evidence: Password tests verify hash upgrade, history policy where configured and no plaintext logging.

requirement: TOTP multi-factor authentication is mandatory for owner, administrator and manager roles and configurable for all staff.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Enrollment displays a locally generated secret/QR, verifies two codes and issues hashed single-use recovery codes.
acceptance_evidence: Privileged login without enrolled MFA is blocked after grace period; recovery use is audited.

requirement: Authentication shall resist enumeration, brute force and credential stuffing.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Uniform responses, per-account/IP database-backed throttles, progressive delay and administrative unlock are implemented.
acceptance_evidence: Automated tests verify thresholds and that valid user existence is not disclosed.

requirement: Sessions shall be server-side, secure and individually revocable.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Cookies are Secure, HttpOnly and SameSite; session list shows device summary, created/last-used time and revocation.
acceptance_evidence: Password reset, role reduction and user disable revoke relevant sessions.

requirement: Privileged actions shall require recent authentication or MFA step-up.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Exports, security changes, destructive merges, model promotion and retention overrides check an authentication-age policy.
acceptance_evidence: Stale sessions are redirected to step-up without losing intended action context.

requirement: Roles and capabilities shall be explicit, least-privilege and configurable only through controlled administration.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Permission bundles are versioned; dangerous capability combinations are highlighted.
acceptance_evidence: Role changes take effect immediately, are audited and cannot grant beyond actor authority.

requirement: Record scope shall support own, team, shared queue, specifically granted and company-wide access.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A central authorization service applies scope to list, search, detail, export and mutation paths.
acceptance_evidence: Authorization matrix tests cover direct URL, search, export and background-job access.

requirement: Field-level sensitivity shall restrict private notes, financial fields, consent evidence and security data.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Forms and views omit unauthorized fields rather than merely hiding with CSS.
acceptance_evidence: Direct POST attempts cannot write restricted fields.

requirement: Staff absence delegation shall be time-bounded, scoped and reversible.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Delegation can cover work queues without changing historical owner; expiry is automatic.
acceptance_evidence: Delegated work, actor and effective interval are auditable.

requirement: User deactivation shall run a controlled offboarding workflow.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Open ownership, approvals, scheduled work and portal grants are inventoried and reassigned before disable completes.
acceptance_evidence: No active object remains assigned to an inactive user unless explicitly exempted.

requirement: Account recovery shall use single-use expiring links and administrative identity verification policy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Recovery does not reveal account status and revokes existing sessions after password change.
acceptance_evidence: Replay and expiry tests pass; events are recorded.

requirement: Security-relevant account events shall notify configured administrators without exposing secrets.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Events include repeated lockout, MFA reset, role elevation, recovery-code exhaustion and portal-isolation failure.
acceptance_evidence: Notification delivery and acknowledgement are visible in the security queue.

requirement: Impersonation shall be disabled by default and, if enabled for support, tightly controlled.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Requires named capability, reason, step-up, visible banner, short expiry and full dual-actor audit.
acceptance_evidence: Impersonated actions cannot alter security settings or erase evidence.

requirement: Emergency owner recovery shall use a documented break-glass process.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A one-time offline recovery code or cPanel-assisted procedure is stored outside normal application UI.
acceptance_evidence: Quarterly recovery drill validates access without bypassing audit.

requirement: Terms, privacy notice and acceptable-use acknowledgements shall be versioned for staff and portal users where required.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Acceptance stores document version, time, user and source.
acceptance_evidence: Updated mandatory terms block applicable use until acknowledged.

requirement: The system shall maintain one canonical organization record per real customer/prospect entity.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Normalized name, domain, phone, address and external reference keys support duplicate detection.
acceptance_evidence: Creating a likely duplicate displays candidates and requires confirm/create/merge decision.

requirement: The system shall maintain canonical contact records that may relate to one or more organizations.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Each relationship has role, status, decision influence, primary flag and effective dates.
acceptance_evidence: A contact’s history remains intact when employment/relationship changes.

requirement: Organization and contact identifiers shall be immutable, non-sequential public-safe values.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Opaque UUID/ULID identifiers are used in links and references; internal database keys are not authorization.
acceptance_evidence: Enumeration tests cannot expose adjacent records.

requirement: Names, emails, phones, domains and addresses shall be normalized while original display values are retained.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Normalization is deterministic, locale-aware where necessary and versioned if rules change.
acceptance_evidence: Duplicate search and exact matching use normalized fields with test fixtures.

requirement: Email and telephone values shall be typed, verified where possible, prioritized and independently suppressible.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A value records label, normalized value, primary status, verification state and last failure.
acceptance_evidence: Invalid primary changes and duplicate values are rejected or resolved.

requirement: Customer lifecycle status shall be derived from operational records and may have a controlled manual override.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Derived reasons are visible; override requires reason, expiry/review date and authorized role.
acceptance_evidence: Nightly integrity checks flag contradictory states.

requirement: Consent and communication preferences shall be purpose- and channel-specific.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Evidence stores source, wording/version, timestamp, lawful-purpose classification and withdrawal.
acceptance_evidence: Outbound guards evaluate effective preference before queuing any message.

requirement: A global do-not-contact state shall override all optional outreach while preserving required service notices.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Each message template is classified as transactional, service, relationship or promotional.
acceptance_evidence: Tests prove precedence across workflow and manual-send paths.

requirement: Customer 360 shall aggregate all permitted lifecycle information without duplicating source records.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Summary cards link to source objects; timeline events carry source, actor, visibility and timestamp.
acceptance_evidence: Deleting/editing source records updates derived views while audit remains.

requirement: Staff shall create structured notes with visibility, category and optional follow-up.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Internal, restricted and portal-visible classes are explicit; rich text is sanitized.
acceptance_evidence: Visibility is enforced server-side and changes are audited.

requirement: Files shall be private, classified and linked to an owning business record.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Metadata includes randomized path, original name, MIME, size, SHA-256, uploader, classification and retention.
acceptance_evidence: Direct public URL access fails; download authorization and audit tests pass.

requirement: File upload shall enforce extension/MIME allowlists, size limits and safe download headers.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Executables, scripts, macros and ambiguous types are rejected; risky previews are disabled.
acceptance_evidence: Security test corpus cannot execute active content through the application.

requirement: Custom fields shall be admin-defined with type, validation, visibility, searchability and lifecycle scope.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Definition versions preserve historical meaning; deletion becomes retirement when data exists.
acceptance_evidence: Invalid values and unauthorized field exposure are prevented.

requirement: Tags shall be governed rather than free-form sprawl.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Tags have owner, purpose, permitted object types, active/retired status and merge capability.
acceptance_evidence: Duplicate/case-variant tags are prevented and retired tags remain historical.

requirement: Potential duplicates shall be generated from exact and fuzzy signals with explainable reasons.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Signals include normalized email/phone/domain/name/address and relationship overlap.
acceptance_evidence: Suggestions show matched fields and confidence; no automatic merge occurs.

requirement: Merge shall provide a preview, field-level conflict choices and downstream impact.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Transactions re-parent safe relationships, preserve aliases and write a merge map.
acceptance_evidence: A failed merge rolls back fully; selected merges are reversible before compaction.

requirement: The system shall support privacy/data-subject cases without assuming a jurisdiction.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Case types include access, correction, restriction, deletion, objection and portability; deadlines are configurable.
acceptance_evidence: Case completion requires evidence, approvals and export/delete report.

requirement: Legal hold shall suspend deletion/archival for specified people, organizations or records.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Hold has reason, authority, scope, start/end and review; access is restricted.
acceptance_evidence: Retention jobs skip held records and report them.

requirement: Contact ownership and account teams shall be explicit.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Primary account owner plus role-based collaborators are supported with effective dates.
acceptance_evidence: Access changes follow assignment and remain auditable.

requirement: A contact preference center shall be available through a signed expiring link.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: The page exposes only permitted preferences, verifies token purpose and writes evidence.
acceptance_evidence: Token tampering/expiry tests pass; changes immediately affect send guards.

requirement: Address and region data shall support service delivery without over-collecting.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Required components are configurable; free-form address is retained where structured parsing is unreliable.
acceptance_evidence: Forms collect only configured fields and reports avoid exposing unnecessary details.

requirement: Customer data changes shall use optimistic concurrency.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Records include a version value; stale submissions receive a conflict view.
acceptance_evidence: Concurrent edit tests prove no silent last-write-wins loss.

requirement: Records shall support soft deletion, restoration and policy-driven final purge.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Soft-deleted records are excluded by default, retain references and require reason.
acceptance_evidence: Restore and final purge produce complete audit and dependency reports.

requirement: Sensitive field access shall be auditable when policy marks a field as restricted.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: View/download events are recorded without logging the sensitive value itself.
acceptance_evidence: Audit reviewers can identify actor, record, purpose and time.

requirement: The system shall calculate a customer data-completeness profile.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Required attributes vary by lifecycle; missing/invalid/stale data becomes an actionable exception.
acceptance_evidence: Dashboard drills from quality score to exact records/fields.

requirement: Leads shall be created from internal entry, authenticated/public web forms, inbound email, CSV import and referral.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Each source adapter maps to the same validated intake service and records source/campaign evidence.
acceptance_evidence: Equivalent payloads create equivalent lead records and domain events.

requirement: Public lead forms shall be configurable, rate-limited and protected without mandatory external CAPTCHA.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Honeypot, minimum-fill-time, IP/session throttles, payload limits and server validation are applied.
acceptance_evidence: Automated abuse tests are rejected while legitimate submissions succeed.

requirement: Lead intake shall run duplicate and existing-customer checks before assignment.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Exact email/phone and organization/domain matches are surfaced; duplicate policy is configurable.
acceptance_evidence: A duplicate does not silently create a second active sequence.

requirement: Lead assignment shall support deterministic rules, capacity-aware round-robin and manual override.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Rule evaluation stores matched rule/version and fallback; unavailable staff are skipped.
acceptance_evidence: Simulation fixtures prove assignment outcomes and no lead remains ownerless.

requirement: Each source and priority shall define a first-response SLA.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: SLA uses business calendar, starts at accepted intake and ends at meaningful human response.
acceptance_evidence: Timers, warning and breach events match test calendar cases.

requirement: Permitted leads shall receive an immediate controlled acknowledgement.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Acknowledgement is transactional, names expected response window and respects suppression/hard-bounce guards.
acceptance_evidence: Outbox idempotency prevents duplicate acknowledgement on replay.

requirement: Qualification shall use structured configurable criteria plus notes.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Fields include need, fit, authority/stakeholders, budget range, timing, urgency, service interest and constraints.
acceptance_evidence: Stage transition validation requires configured evidence.

requirement: Lead engagement shall distinguish customer reply from passive delivery/open signals.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Meaningful inbound reply changes state and stops generic sequence; open tracking is disabled by default.
acceptance_evidence: Reply ingestion reliably cancels future generic steps.

requirement: A lead shall always have a next action or an approved wake-up date.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Integrity rule runs on every transition and nightly; missing action becomes an exception.
acceptance_evidence: Active lead cannot be saved into an unowned/no-action condition.

requirement: Follow-up sequences shall be selected by source, service interest, stage and consent.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Sequence enrolment stores version and eligibility facts; no silent re-enrolment after exit.
acceptance_evidence: Simulation shows exact messages/tasks/dates and stop conditions.

requirement: Stale leads shall be surfaced before they become abandoned.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Staleness varies by state and priority; escalation first returns work to owner then manager.
acceptance_evidence: Dashboard and notifications identify elapsed time and required resolution.

requirement: Disqualification shall require structured reason and optional reconsideration date.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Reasons include poor fit, invalid, duplicate, no authority, no timing, unavailable service and policy restriction.
acceptance_evidence: Disqualification immediately exits active outreach.

requirement: Nurture shall be a controlled low-frequency state, not a dumping ground.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Requires reason, next review date, permitted communication purpose and owner.
acceptance_evidence: Nurture volume, aging and conversion are reportable.

requirement: Conversion shall create/link canonical organization, contact and opportunity atomically.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Field mapping preview resolves identity conflicts; source and lead history remain linked.
acceptance_evidence: Any failure rolls back all created/linked objects.

requirement: Lead scoring shall show rule/model reasons and never block staff review.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Score includes freshness, fit, engagement and completeness; low confidence causes abstention.
acceptance_evidence: A user can inspect feature snapshot and provide correctness feedback.

requirement: Lead-source attribution shall preserve original, latest and converting source where known.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Source events are append-only and do not overwrite original acquisition evidence.
acceptance_evidence: Reports can distinguish first-touch, last-touch and self-reported source.

requirement: Lead bulk operations shall be permissioned, previewed and bounded.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Assignment/tag/status actions cap selection size, validate each record and emit a result report.
acceptance_evidence: Partial failures do not hide unsuccessful records or bypass automation guards.

requirement: Lead response and conversion outcomes shall feed process and model evaluation.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Outcome data includes response time, qualification, conversion, loss reason and owner actions.
acceptance_evidence: Nightly aggregates reconcile to source records.

requirement: Pipelines and stages shall be versioned and scoped by service or business process.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Stages define order, probability guidance, required fields, SLA, allowed transitions and entry/exit rules.
acceptance_evidence: Changing a pipeline creates a new version and does not rewrite history.

requirement: Every active opportunity shall have owner, organization/contact, stage, expected value, close date and next action.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Validation applies at create, transition, import and automation paths.
acceptance_evidence: Integrity job reports and prevents unresolved violations.

requirement: Opportunity stakeholders shall record role, influence, sentiment and decision responsibility.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Contacts can be buyer, user, technical reviewer, approver or blocker with effective dates.
acceptance_evidence: Opportunity view shows missing decision roles as a risk.

requirement: Products and services shall use a governed catalogue with active dates, SKU/code, pricing guidance and onboarding template mapping.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Retired items remain on history but cannot be newly selected.
acceptance_evidence: Won handoff resolves exact catalogue version.

requirement: Opportunity value shall support base and transaction currency with recorded exchange-rate source/manual value.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No live external rate API is assumed; authorized staff enter or configure periodic rates.
acceptance_evidence: Forecast calculations are reproducible from stored values.

requirement: Stage transition shall require configured exit evidence.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Examples include discovery completeness, solution confirmation, approved quote and commit evidence.
acceptance_evidence: Direct URL/API/form attempts cannot bypass transition guard.

requirement: Stage history shall record elapsed business/clock time and reason for backward movement.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Every move is append-only; correction uses a controlled corrective event.
acceptance_evidence: Velocity reports reconcile to stage events.

requirement: Opportunity risk shall include staleness, missing stakeholder, overdue action, quote expiry, unresolved objection and negative service/feedback signals.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Reasons are visible and ordered; user can acknowledge or correct facts.
acceptance_evidence: Risk refresh produces deterministic fixtures for rules mode.

requirement: Quotes/proposals shall be versioned business records with immutable issued snapshots.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Drafts can change; issue freezes line items, taxes/discounts, terms, expiry and document checksum.
acceptance_evidence: Issued version can be reproduced and prior versions remain accessible.

requirement: Discount, exception and high-value quote thresholds shall require configured approval.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Approval captures requester, reviewer, decision, reason and expiry; approver cannot approve own request where four-eyes applies.
acceptance_evidence: Unauthorized issue is blocked and approval path is tested.

requirement: Customer-facing quote delivery shall use signed links or controlled attachments and capture delivery evidence.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Link expiry, view/download evidence and resend rules are stored without invasive tracking.
acceptance_evidence: Expired/tampered links fail and do not leak other documents.

requirement: Quote expiry shall create owner action and optionally send approved reminder within communication policy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Reminder stops on reply, acceptance, rejection, opportunity closure or suppression.
acceptance_evidence: Replay cannot send duplicate reminder.

requirement: Forecast categories shall be explicit and not inferred solely from stage.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Pipeline, upside, commit, closed and excluded categories have permissioned changes and reason.
acceptance_evidence: Forecast report can reconcile each amount to record and category history.

requirement: Won transition shall be atomic and idempotent.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: It freezes outcome facts, creates customer/onboarding/success objects, assigns owners and emits one won event.
acceptance_evidence: Repeated transition attempts do not duplicate onboarding or messages.

requirement: Won handoff shall require commercial and delivery information.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Required handoff includes purchased items, promised outcomes, contacts, dates, constraints, documents and open risks.
acceptance_evidence: Onboarding owner can reject incomplete handoff back to sales with reason.

requirement: Lost/no-decision transition shall require structured outcome evidence.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Reason, competitor where relevant, decision timing, recoverability and feedback eligibility are recorded.
acceptance_evidence: Loss analysis reports distinguish fit, process, price, timing and no-decision.

requirement: Paused opportunities shall require review date, reason and communication plan.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Promotional workflows pause; wake-up task is durable.
acceptance_evidence: No paused opportunity remains beyond review date without escalation.

requirement: Opportunity collaboration shall support internal notes, tasks, files and approvals without exposing restricted content to portal users.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Visibility is explicit per artifact.
acceptance_evidence: Portal authorization tests cannot access internal artifacts.

requirement: Manager pipeline review shall surface exceptions and data quality, not only totals.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Views include no next action, stale stage, slipped close date, expired quote, unconfirmed value and risk trend.
acceptance_evidence: Each exception drills to actionable records.

requirement: Opportunity probability shall show whether it is stage guidance, staff override or model estimate.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Override requires reason; model estimate never silently changes committed forecast category.
acceptance_evidence: Forecast evidence identifies source and version.

requirement: Commercial record deletion shall be restricted after issued quote or financial outcome.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Correction uses reversal/amendment events; purge follows retention authority.
acceptance_evidence: Audit and reports preserve historical totals.

requirement: Sales outcomes shall feed automation and intelligence evaluation.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Won/lost/no-decision, cycle time, stage progression, response and override data are captured.
acceptance_evidence: Evaluation jobs use immutable outcome timestamps and avoid future-data leakage.

requirement: The system shall provide a unified work queue for tasks, replies, approvals, SLA exceptions, low-feedback recovery, renewals and automation failures.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Each item has source object, severity, owner/queue, due time, state and deep link.
acceptance_evidence: Queue counts reconcile to source records and are permission-filtered.

requirement: Tasks shall require a subject, owner, due time or policy-approved no-date status, priority and linked context.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Task types may require structured outcome fields.
acceptance_evidence: Invalid tasks cannot be created through UI, import or automation.

requirement: Recurring tasks shall use explicit recurrence rules and create bounded future instances.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Completion and skipped occurrences are distinct; recurrence can be ended without rewriting history.
acceptance_evidence: DST, month-end and missed-run fixtures pass.

requirement: Reminders shall be durable scheduled jobs, not browser timers.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Reminder delivery is idempotent, retryable and visible in job history.
acceptance_evidence: Browser closure or application restart does not lose reminders.

requirement: Staff shall log calls, meetings and channel-assisted contacts with outcome and next step.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Channel, participants, direction, duration, summary, outcome and consent-relevant result are captured.
acceptance_evidence: A completed contact can update last meaningful interaction and automation exits.

requirement: Inbound customer replies shall generate or update actionable queue items until acknowledged.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Thread ownership, urgency and lifecycle context determine routing.
acceptance_evidence: Multiple messages in one thread do not create uncontrolled duplicate tasks.

requirement: Tasks shall support completion, cancellation, delegation and policy-bounded snooze with reason.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: State transitions are audited; snooze cannot bypass hard SLA without escalation.
acceptance_evidence: Overdue metrics use original and current due dates.

requirement: Approvals shall be first-class work items with request snapshot, policy, reviewer and deadline.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Approve/reject/request-change decisions are immutable events with comments.
acceptance_evidence: A changed underlying object invalidates stale approval where policy requires.

requirement: Shared queues shall support claim, assignment and release without race conditions.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Claim uses atomic update/lock; queue membership is role-governed.
acceptance_evidence: Two users cannot simultaneously claim the same item.

requirement: Manager escalation shall be event-driven and deduplicated.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Escalation records original owner, elapsed breach, prior reminders and required decision.
acceptance_evidence: Repeated cron runs update one escalation rather than creating duplicates.

requirement: Daily digests shall summarize actionable exceptions using permission-aware content.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Digest generation caps items, links to saved views and omits sensitive details from subject lines.
acceptance_evidence: Unsubscribed optional digest does not suppress mandatory security notices.

requirement: Calendar views shall display CRM work without requiring an external calendar service.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Day/week/month views use company timezone and business calendar.
acceptance_evidence: DST and user timezone display tests pass.

requirement: Bulk task actions shall be capped, previewed and individually validated.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Mixed success produces a downloadable result report.
acceptance_evidence: Authorization and workflow hooks execute per object.

requirement: A task or activity may be marked private/restricted according to field policy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Restricted summaries do not appear in unauthorized search, timeline or exports.
acceptance_evidence: Permission tests cover direct links and report aggregation.

requirement: Activity corrections shall preserve the original event and author.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Corrections create a version/amendment with reason instead of silent overwrite after lock period.
acceptance_evidence: Audit view reconstructs original and current presentation.

requirement: Workload dashboards shall show capacity, aging and blocked work by person/team.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Counts exclude completed/cancelled work and explain shared-queue treatment.
acceptance_evidence: Dashboard totals reconcile to work queue filters.

requirement: Outbound email shall use configured Truehost SMTP mailboxes with per-mailbox credentials stored as environment secrets.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: The system validates connection settings through an administrator test and never exposes passwords.
acceptance_evidence: Credential errors create a system incident without logging secret values.

requirement: Inbound email shall be polled from configured Truehost IMAP mailboxes by bounded cron command.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Each message is identified by mailbox, UID and Message-ID; processed state is durable.
acceptance_evidence: Re-polling the same mailbox cannot duplicate message records or actions.

requirement: Email threading shall use Message-ID, In-Reply-To, References and controlled reply-address tokens.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Fallback matching uses normalized participants and bounded subject/time logic with confidence.
acceptance_evidence: Fixtures attach replies to the correct conversation and flag ambiguity for review.

requirement: Sending shall use a transactional outbox and idempotency key.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Business transaction creates outbox record; sender claims and transmits later; provider response is stored.
acceptance_evidence: Crash/retry tests do not produce duplicate sends.

requirement: The outbox shall prioritize security/service messages over relationship follow-up while honoring global rate caps.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Priority lanes still obey mailbox health and provider throttle.
acceptance_evidence: Load test confirms 60/hour internal ceiling and fair processing.

requirement: Templates shall be versioned, typed by communication purpose and scoped by lifecycle/channel.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Each version stores subject/body, variables, classification, owner, review status and active dates.
acceptance_evidence: Sent messages retain the exact rendered version.

requirement: Template variables shall use an allowlist with typed fallback rules.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Missing required variables block send and create a visible exception; arbitrary code/expression execution is prohibited.
acceptance_evidence: Security tests cannot access unauthorized attributes or execute template injection.

requirement: Customer-facing HTML shall be sanitized and accompanied by a plain-text alternative.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Local assets are embedded/linked safely; no external tracking scripts or fonts.
acceptance_evidence: Message preview and test inbox show both parts and safe markup.

requirement: Controlled draft assembly shall combine approved blocks rather than generative free text.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Greeting, context, answer, next-step and signature blocks are selected by rules/classification and remain editable before approval.
acceptance_evidence: Draft records identify every source block and staff modifications.

requirement: Manual send and automated send shall pass the same communication-policy guard.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Guard checks recipient validity, purpose consent, DNC, bounce, complaint, low-feedback hold, quiet hours and frequency caps.
acceptance_evidence: A direct-send attempt cannot bypass suppression.

requirement: Suppression shall be channel-, address- and purpose-aware with a global override.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Hard bounce suppresses address; unsubscribe suppresses purpose; global DNC suppresses optional contact.
acceptance_evidence: Precedence tests cover conflicting preferences.

requirement: One-click unsubscribe links shall be signed, purpose-specific, single-recipient and tamper-resistant.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: The confirmation page records evidence and offers permitted preference choices.
acceptance_evidence: Unsubscribe takes effect before any next outbox claim.

requirement: Bounce and delivery-failure handling shall classify hard, soft, policy and transient failures.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Hard failures suppress; soft failures retry with limits; ambiguous notices enter review.
acceptance_evidence: Synthetic DSN messages produce expected state and task.

requirement: Replies shall immediately stop or pause configured outbound sequences.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: The inbound transaction emits a reply event after message/customer match; future jobs are cancelled idempotently.
acceptance_evidence: A reply received between scheduling and send causes final policy guard to cancel the message.

requirement: Complaint or negative-intent classification shall create recovery work and suppress promotional outreach.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Low-confidence classifications require human confirmation; severe explicit phrases may trigger immediate hold.
acceptance_evidence: Recovery and hold appear within one polling/cron interval.

requirement: Message approval shall be configurable by template, risk, audience, value and staff role.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Approval locks a rendered snapshot; material edits invalidate it.
acceptance_evidence: Unapproved high-risk draft cannot enter send-ready state.

requirement: Attachments shall be selected from authorized private files and revalidated at send time.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Size/type, customer association, retention and visibility are checked.
acceptance_evidence: Unauthorized or deleted file blocks send and records reason.

requirement: Inbound attachments shall be quarantined logically until validation completes.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Files receive randomized names, safe classification and no inline execution; disallowed types are withheld.
acceptance_evidence: User sees validation state and cannot download rejected active content.

requirement: The CRM shall not implement a mass mailing or purchased-list campaign feature.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Recipient selection is record/workflow based, capped and relationship-specific.
acceptance_evidence: No UI/API can enqueue an arbitrary large address list.

requirement: Open tracking shall be disabled by default and not required for any workflow or score.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: If enabled after policy approval, it uses a transparent first-party pixel and is classified separately.
acceptance_evidence: Core follow-up functions correctly with all open data absent.

requirement: Click tracking shall be disabled by default; signed application links may record necessary portal/quote actions.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No general URL rewriting service is used.
acceptance_evidence: Message links remain human-readable and safe.

requirement: Staging and test environments shall intercept all outbound customer email.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Only an allowlisted test domain/mailbox may receive; headers identify original intended recipient.
acceptance_evidence: Automated release test proves no production customer address is reachable.

requirement: Mailbox health shall be monitored by internal checks.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Last successful connect, poll, send, UID state, latency and failure count are recorded.
acceptance_evidence: Stale mailbox health creates an administrator incident.

requirement: Message bodies and raw source shall follow storage budgets and archival policy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Recent searchable metadata stays in DB; large/raw bodies may be compressed to private filesystem with checksum.
acceptance_evidence: Archived messages remain retrievable through authorized view.

requirement: All customer communications shall be attributable and reproducible.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Record stores sender identity, mailbox, recipients, purpose, template version, rendered body hash, attachments, approvals and delivery events.
acceptance_evidence: Audit export reconstructs what was sent and why without relying on mutable template content.

requirement: Workflow definitions shall be structured, versioned and immutable after activation.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A workflow has name, owner, purpose, trigger, conditions, steps, exits, caps, approvals, status and version.
acceptance_evidence: Editing an active workflow creates a draft version; existing runs retain original version.

requirement: Only allowlisted triggers, conditions and actions shall be executable.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No arbitrary Python, shell, SQL, HTTP callback or template code can be configured.
acceptance_evidence: Security review confirms configuration cannot become remote code execution.

requirement: Supported triggers shall include record create/change, stage transition, message received/sent, task completion/overdue, ticket events, feedback, inactivity, renewal date, scheduled date and manual enrolment.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Each trigger emits a typed domain event after transaction commit.
acceptance_evidence: Contract tests verify payload schema and one event per committed occurrence.

requirement: Conditions shall be typed and validated against an allowlisted field dictionary.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Operators depend on data type; nested boolean groups have depth/size limits.
acceptance_evidence: Invalid or unauthorized fields cannot be saved or evaluated.

requirement: Actions shall include assignment, task creation, notification, approved email/draft, field transition, tag, case/ticket creation, feedback request, escalation, score refresh, pause/end and controlled workflow enrolment.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Each action declares idempotency, authorization and compensating behavior.
acceptance_evidence: Action tests cover repeat execution and partial failure.

requirement: Workflow graphs shall be acyclic and limited to 30 steps.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Activation validation rejects direct/indirect cycles and excessive paths.
acceptance_evidence: Cycle test fixtures fail activation with clear path evidence.

requirement: Workflow enrolment shall use a unique key and explicit re-entry policy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Policies include once ever, once per version, once per event key or after cooldown.
acceptance_evidence: Duplicate domain events cannot create unintended duplicate runs.

requirement: Every run shall persist subject, workflow version, trigger event, state, current step and outcome.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Run history is append-only for material transitions.
acceptance_evidence: Operations can reconstruct all decisions and actions.

requirement: Delayed steps shall create durable ScheduledJob rows; the process shall never sleep while waiting.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Jobs store scheduled time, status, attempt, lease, idempotency, result/error and next retry.
acceptance_evidence: Server restart does not lose or duplicate delays.

requirement: Cron runners shall acquire a database lease and process bounded batches.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: One active runner per command; stale lease recovery is time-bounded; batch max 50 jobs or 40 seconds.
acceptance_evidence: Concurrent runner tests show one claim per job.

requirement: Job claiming shall be atomic and safe under MySQL/MariaDB transaction semantics.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Claim query/lock strategy is documented and tested on production engine version.
acceptance_evidence: Race tests do not double-execute actions.

requirement: Each action shall have an idempotency key with a database uniqueness guarantee.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Key includes action type, subject, workflow version/step and logical occurrence.
acceptance_evidence: Forced crash after external send boundary is handled without silent duplicate.

requirement: Retries shall be classified and bounded.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Transient errors use exponential backoff with jitter; permanent/policy errors do not retry; maximum attempts are configurable.
acceptance_evidence: Retry schedule and terminal state match error fixtures.

requirement: Failed terminal jobs shall enter a dead-letter queue with owner, severity and replay controls.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Replay requires reason and re-runs current policy guard; bulk replay is capped.
acceptance_evidence: Dead-letter aging and resolution are reportable.

requirement: Exit conditions shall be evaluated before every delayed action and at relevant domain events.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Reply, opt-out, status change, completion, complaint, suppression, duplicate objective and manual stop can exit.
acceptance_evidence: A stale scheduled message is cancelled before sending.

requirement: Communication policy shall be re-evaluated at outbox claim time.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Eligibility at workflow scheduling never guarantees later send.
acceptance_evidence: Changed consent/bounce/hold after schedule prevents transmission.

requirement: Workflow conflicts shall follow deterministic precedence.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Security/legal holds outrank recovery, service, relationship and promotional actions; duplicate objectives collapse.
acceptance_evidence: Simulation displays conflict resolution and winning policy.

requirement: Frequency caps and quiet hours shall apply across workflows, not per workflow only.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A communication ledger tracks recipient/purpose/channel in company timezone.
acceptance_evidence: Two simultaneous workflows cannot exceed global cap.

requirement: Staff shall be able to pause a workflow run, a customer’s automations, a workflow definition or all outbound automation.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Scope, reason, actor, start/end and resume behavior are explicit.
acceptance_evidence: Emergency stop halts new claims within one cron interval and leaves recoverable state.

requirement: Simulation shall evaluate a draft workflow against selected records or historical snapshots without side effects.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: It shows trigger match, conditions, dates, actions, guards, conflicts and exits.
acceptance_evidence: Simulation performs no email, mutation or customer-visible event.

requirement: Test mode shall execute against designated test records/mailboxes with production-like persistence.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Test events are marked and excluded from business metrics.
acceptance_evidence: Activation checklist includes successful test run evidence.

requirement: Activation shall require validation, owner, reviewer, change summary and effective time.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: High-impact workflows require four-eyes approval.
acceptance_evidence: Unreviewed or invalid definitions cannot become active.

requirement: Rollback shall allow deactivation and restoration of a prior definition for new enrolments.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Existing runs follow an explicit migration policy: continue, cancel, or controlled migrate.
acceptance_evidence: Rollback report lists affected runs and actions.

requirement: Workflow configuration shall have dependency analysis.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: System identifies referenced fields, stages, templates, queues and nested workflows before retirement/change.
acceptance_evidence: Blocking dependencies prevent unsafe deletion.

requirement: Domain events and transactional outbox records shall be created in the same database transaction as business changes.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Post-commit workers publish/consume durable records.
acceptance_evidence: Rollback tests create neither event nor automation run.

requirement: Event handlers shall be idempotent and record consumption state.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Consumer key and event ID uniqueness prevent duplicate effects.
acceptance_evidence: Redelivery tests produce one logical result.

requirement: Nested workflow enrolment shall be bounded with correlation and depth guards.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Event chain carries correlation ID and depth; maximum five nested enrolments.
acceptance_evidence: Loop-like cross-workflow fixtures terminate safely and alert.

requirement: Bulk workflow enrolment shall be queued, capped, previewed and policy-checked per record.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No synchronous mass enrolment or direct large mailing is permitted.
acceptance_evidence: Result report identifies skipped, failed and enrolled records.

requirement: Workflow metrics shall include eligible, enrolled, exited, completed, failed, message delivered/replied, task completed, business outcome and time saved estimates.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Metrics are defined per version and avoid attributing outcomes after an incompatible change.
acceptance_evidence: Dashboard reconciles counts to run/action records.

requirement: Automation history shall be human-readable from the affected customer timeline.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Timeline displays trigger, action, reason, status and link to run without exposing technical secrets.
acceptance_evidence: Staff can explain why a task/message/status change occurred.

requirement: A won opportunity shall create exactly one onboarding case from the mapped product/service template.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Creation is part of idempotent won handoff and stores source opportunity, catalogue/template versions and handoff facts.
acceptance_evidence: Repeated won events do not duplicate the case.

requirement: Onboarding templates shall define milestones, tasks, dependencies, owner roles, required customer inputs, SLA and completion rules.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Templates are versioned; active case retains its instantiated snapshot.
acceptance_evidence: Template edits do not silently alter in-flight cases.

requirement: An onboarding case shall require accountable owner, target completion date, current phase and next action.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Owner is assigned by configured rule with fallback queue.
acceptance_evidence: No case starts unowned or without initial work.

requirement: Handoff completeness shall be validated before customer-facing onboarding starts.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Purchased items, objectives, stakeholders, dates, constraints, promises, documents and risks are required by template.
acceptance_evidence: Onboarding may return an incomplete handoff with structured reason and escalation.

requirement: Milestone dependencies shall prevent invalid completion order while allowing authorized exception.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Exception requires reason, impact and approver where configured.
acceptance_evidence: Dependency graph is acyclic and validation-tested.

requirement: Customer inputs and documents shall be requested through signed email links or authenticated portal tasks.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Request shows purpose, due date, accepted types and status; uploaded file remains private.
acceptance_evidence: Token and portal isolation tests pass.

requirement: Customer reminders shall stop on completion, reply, hold, suppression or staff override.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Reminder cadence is template-based and respects global communication policy.
acceptance_evidence: Delayed jobs are cancelled idempotently.

requirement: Progress shall be computed from weighted required milestones rather than self-reported percentage.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Blocked, optional and waived items are represented explicitly.
acceptance_evidence: Displayed percentage reconciles to milestone states.

requirement: Blockers shall have category, owner, impact, next action and escalation deadline.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: High-impact blocker may affect customer health and suppress promotional workflows.
acceptance_evidence: Blocker aging is visible to managers.

requirement: Onboarding communications shall use approved templates and expose expected next step.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Welcome, input request, progress update, delay notice and completion messages are versioned.
acceptance_evidence: Sent evidence links to case and template version.

requirement: Case completion shall require all mandatory outcomes, customer handoff and success baseline.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Completion records delivered items, open follow-ups, support path, success owner and initial health facts.
acceptance_evidence: Incomplete required items block terminal state.

requirement: Completion shall schedule a feedback request and customer-success review.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Cadence and eligibility are configurable; low feedback opens recovery.
acceptance_evidence: One completion creates one eligible survey request.

requirement: Abandoned or cancelled onboarding shall require reason, commercial impact and follow-up decision.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Cancellation can trigger churn/risk or sales review.
acceptance_evidence: Outcome is reportable separately from completed cases.

requirement: Onboarding analytics shall show time-to-value, milestone delay, blocker cause, rework, completion and feedback.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Metrics use event history and template version.
acceptance_evidence: Reports reconcile to cases and exclude test data.

requirement: Tickets shall be created from support mailbox, public/authenticated form, portal and staff entry.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: All sources use a common intake service, dedupe key and source evidence.
acceptance_evidence: Reprocessing an inbound message does not create duplicate ticket.

requirement: Ticket reference numbers shall be human-readable but not authorization credentials.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Opaque identifiers protect links; reference search remains permission-aware.
acceptance_evidence: Guessing a reference cannot expose a ticket.

requirement: Triage shall capture category, priority, affected service, organization/contact, owner and required SLA.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Rules may suggest values; staff confirms low-confidence classifications.
acceptance_evidence: New/triage queues surface missing required information.

requirement: Priority shall be derived from impact and urgency with controlled override.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Matrix and override reason are versioned; critical priority notifies manager.
acceptance_evidence: Fixtures calculate expected priority and escalation.

requirement: Business calendars and SLA policies shall be configurable by priority/service.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: First response, update and resolution targets support business hours, holidays and pause rules.
acceptance_evidence: Clock calculations pass boundary, holiday and DST tests.

requirement: A meaningful first response shall be distinguishable from automated acknowledgement.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Acknowledgement confirms receipt; first-response clock stops only on approved human/service response.
acceptance_evidence: Metrics cannot be gamed by auto-reply.

requirement: Waiting states shall require a specific dependency and wake-up/reminder date.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Customer-wait may pause configured clock; internal-wait normally does not.
acceptance_evidence: Expired waiting state creates owner action.

requirement: Ticket conversation shall separate customer-visible messages, portal comments and internal notes.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Visibility labels persist in compose and history; restricted data is server-filtered.
acceptance_evidence: Portal never receives internal note content or metadata.

requirement: Ticket assignment shall support team queues, skills/service rules, claim and escalation.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Atomic claim prevents duplicate ownership; absent users are excluded.
acceptance_evidence: Assignment history and SLA impact are visible.

requirement: Related tickets shall support duplicate merge, parent/child incident and linked problem records.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Merge preserves message provenance and customer visibility; split creates traceable linkage.
acceptance_evidence: No message or attachment is orphaned.

requirement: Critical incidents shall have a distinct workflow with update cadence and management oversight.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Incident state, impact, affected customers, updates, owner and resolution timeline are tracked.
acceptance_evidence: Missed incident update cadence creates escalation.

requirement: Staff shall record troubleshooting steps, diagnosis, root cause and resolution category.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Structured fields are required by configured ticket categories.
acceptance_evidence: Resolution reports can group recurring causes.

requirement: Knowledge articles shall be versioned, approved and scoped internal/portal.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Article usage can be linked to tickets; retirement preserves historical references.
acceptance_evidence: Unapproved/private article cannot appear in portal.

requirement: Resolution shall require a customer-facing summary and next-step expectation.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Resolved state stores resolution time, category, root cause where applicable and validation window.
acceptance_evidence: Required fields prevent premature resolution.

requirement: Customer reply during validation shall reopen or create review according to policy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Reopen retains original resolution and increments interval count.
acceptance_evidence: Reply routing does not silently append to a closed invisible ticket.

requirement: Resolved tickets shall trigger a policy-controlled CSAT request.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Eligibility considers fatigue, contact preference, ticket type and recent survey.
acceptance_evidence: One resolution interval creates at most one request.

requirement: Low CSAT or explicit unresolved feedback shall create a recovery case and notify owner/manager.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Promotional communication is suppressed while recovery is open.
acceptance_evidence: Action appears within one automation interval and is closed only with outcome.

requirement: SLA breach shall create an exception with reason, ownership and corrective action.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Breach cannot be removed by later editing dates; correction is an audited event.
acceptance_evidence: SLA report distinguishes avoidable, customer-wait and policy exception.

requirement: Ticket attachments shall follow CRM private-file and visibility controls.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Inbound files remain logically quarantined until validation; portal access is scoped.
acceptance_evidence: Disallowed content cannot be served inline.

requirement: Support dashboards shall show queue health, aging, SLA risk, reopen, backlog, cause and satisfaction.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Every aggregate drills to matching tickets.
acceptance_evidence: Dashboard totals reconcile to event-derived metrics.

requirement: Support data shall influence customer health using explainable features.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Open severity, repeated issue, breach, reopen and low feedback become reason-coded health inputs.
acceptance_evidence: Health snapshot links to exact support evidence.

requirement: Ticket retention and redaction shall preserve operational evidence while minimizing unnecessary sensitive content.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Policy can archive message bodies/files separately and retain metadata.
acceptance_evidence: Authorized archive retrieval and purge reports are tested.

requirement: Survey definitions shall be versioned and typed by purpose.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Supported purposes include ticket CSAT, customer effort, onboarding, relationship/NPS-style, lost deal, churn and targeted research.
acceptance_evidence: Responses retain exact question/version and scale labels.

requirement: Feedback requests shall have eligibility, trigger, delay, expiry, channel, fatigue and recovery rules.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Eligibility is evaluated at schedule and send time.
acceptance_evidence: Ineligible requests cancel with reason rather than silently disappearing.

requirement: Public feedback links shall be signed, scoped, expiring and resistant to enumeration.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Token identifies request only, not arbitrary customer records; optional one-response enforcement is configurable.
acceptance_evidence: Tampered/expired token fails without revealing customer data.

requirement: One-click rating shall confirm the selected value and allow optional comment without coercive redirects.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: User may correct within policy window; original and amended events remain.
acceptance_evidence: Rating capture works without account login and without third-party scripts.

requirement: Authenticated portal feedback shall bind to the logged-in contact and organization.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: The server disregards supplied customer identifiers outside the session scope.
acceptance_evidence: Cross-tenant tests fail safely.

requirement: Survey fatigue controls shall operate across all workflows.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Minimum interval varies by purpose; urgent recovery follow-up is separately classified.
acceptance_evidence: Competing requests resolve deterministically.

requirement: Low-score thresholds and severe phrases shall create a recovery case.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Recovery has owner, due time, source, severity, contact status and outcome.
acceptance_evidence: No low-score response remains without accountable action.

requirement: Low feedback shall suppress promotional/advocacy automation until recovery closes or an authorized override expires.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Hold is visible in customer 360 and communication guard.
acceptance_evidence: Scheduled messages are cancelled/deferred before send.

requirement: Free-text feedback classification shall run locally with confidence and reason/keyword evidence.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Categories include praise, unresolved issue, responsiveness, quality, usability, price/value, cancellation risk and other.
acceptance_evidence: Low-confidence text routes to human review; raw text is never sent externally.

requirement: Staff shall code root cause, recovery action and customer outcome.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Resolution options include resolved, accepted, no response, invalid, product/process action and churn risk.
acceptance_evidence: Recovery closure requires outcome evidence.

requirement: Anonymous survey mode, when enabled, shall not secretly re-identify respondents.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Definition clearly states anonymity; links omit customer binding and reporting enforces minimum cohort size.
acceptance_evidence: No per-contact timeline event is created for anonymous mode.

requirement: Relationship/NPS-style reporting shall use clearly labeled methodology and avoid trademark-dependent claims.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Promoter/passive/detractor thresholds are configurable and stored with report.
acceptance_evidence: Historical results use the threshold version valid at response time.

requirement: Feedback changes and deletion requests shall follow governance policy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Original response, correction, restriction and purge decisions are auditable.
acceptance_evidence: Reports update without losing required evidentiary record.

requirement: Feedback shall influence health and model outcomes only after validation rules.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Spam, duplicate, test and invalid responses are excluded; weight varies by recency/purpose.
acceptance_evidence: Health reason shows exact qualifying response.

requirement: Managers shall see themes, trend, response rate, recovery time and unresolved low feedback.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Aggregates suppress tiny cohorts where privacy policy requires.
acceptance_evidence: Every non-suppressed metric drills to authorized source.

requirement: Survey email and pages shall meet accessibility, mobile and plain-language requirements.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Keyboard, labels, contrast, error handling and 360px responsive tests pass.
acceptance_evidence: Survey can be completed with scripts disabled where practicable.

requirement: Feedback request delivery failure shall create an operational status, not a negative customer score.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Bounce/expiry/no-response are distinct outcomes.
acceptance_evidence: Model features cannot treat non-delivery as dissatisfaction.

requirement: Each active customer shall have a success owner, lifecycle state and next review date.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Assignment derives from won handoff or admin rule; missing owner becomes an integrity exception.
acceptance_evidence: No active customer remains unowned.

requirement: Customer health shall be a versioned snapshot with score, band, confidence, reasons and evidence links.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Dimensions may include engagement, support, feedback, onboarding, commercial and relationship risk.
acceptance_evidence: A user can explain every score component.

requirement: Health rules and weights shall be configurable by customer segment/service and effective date.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Changes create a model/rule version; historical snapshots remain reproducible.
acceptance_evidence: Backfill is explicit and separately labeled.

requirement: Health shall support authorized manual override with reason and expiry.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Override does not delete computed score; both are displayed.
acceptance_evidence: Expired override automatically returns to computed state and creates review task.

requirement: At-risk status shall create a recovery/success plan.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Plan includes risk reasons, owner, actions, target outcome, review cadence and communication hold.
acceptance_evidence: High-risk customer cannot remain without active plan or approved exception.

requirement: Inactivity detection shall use meaningful interactions and service-specific thresholds.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Automated sends alone do not reset meaningful engagement unless policy explicitly allows.
acceptance_evidence: Fixtures distinguish staff activity from customer engagement.

requirement: Success plans shall track customer outcomes, milestones, evidence and blockers.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Outcome progress is not inferred only from message volume.
acceptance_evidence: Review can show achieved, at risk, blocked and unverified outcomes.

requirement: Renewal records shall include date, value, products/services, owner, notice window and decision state.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Renewal can be created at won handoff or manually; changes are audited.
acceptance_evidence: Renewal calendar and forecast reconcile to records.

requirement: Renewal workflows shall begin at configured 90/60/30-day or service-specific milestones.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Health and open issues determine standard versus recovery path.
acceptance_evidence: No duplicate renewal sequence occurs for one renewal cycle.

requirement: Renewal preparation shall surface unresolved support, low feedback, onboarding gaps, usage/status notes and commercial changes.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Evidence is linked and action owner assigned.
acceptance_evidence: Promotional ask is held while critical recovery work is open.

requirement: Expansion/cross-sell shall be recommendation-only unless staff confirms suitability.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Suggestion requires explainable signal and respects communication policy.
acceptance_evidence: No automatic upsell email is sent from a model score alone.

requirement: Churn shall capture effective date, services/value lost, structured reason, preventability and evidence.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Churn transition stops inappropriate active workflows and opens final obligations.
acceptance_evidence: Revenue retention reports reconcile to churn records.

requirement: Win-back eligibility shall require reason, minimum cooling period, contact permission and owner.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Sequence is low-frequency, bounded and stops on reply/opt-out.
acceptance_evidence: Ineligible churned contacts cannot be enrolled.

requirement: Advocacy/referral/review requests shall be suggested only after positive validated signals and no active risk.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Staff approves timing; fatigue and purpose consent apply.
acceptance_evidence: Low feedback/support severity automatically suppresses suggestion.

requirement: Customer check-ins shall be scheduled based on segment, health and relationship cadence.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Missed reviews become work queue exceptions.
acceptance_evidence: Calendar shows due/overdue reviews with reason.

requirement: Portfolio views shall prioritize actionable risk, renewal and opportunity rather than only average score.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Views show score change, reasons, value, due actions and unresolved exceptions.
acceptance_evidence: Each item drills to customer evidence.

requirement: Customer success outcomes shall feed model evaluation with leakage-safe timestamps.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Recovered/not recovered, renewed/churned, expansion and action completion are stored.
acceptance_evidence: Training datasets exclude facts occurring after prediction time.

requirement: Customer state transitions shall be reversible only through explicit corrective events.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Accidental churn/renewal corrections preserve original decision and reporting adjustment.
acceptance_evidence: Audit reconstructs both operational and corrected state.

requirement: All intelligence functions shall execute locally within the application account and shall not transmit customer data to an external model/API.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Inference uses deterministic rules or lightweight pure-Python statistical models; artifacts are stored as versioned JSON/private files.
acceptance_evidence: Network inspection and code review find no runtime AI endpoint dependency.

requirement: Core CRM operation shall remain fully usable when all intelligence functions are disabled.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Scoring/classification failures degrade to rules/manual queues and never block save, reply, ticket or support work.
acceptance_evidence: Failure-injection tests confirm graceful fallback.

requirement: Every intelligence use case shall have a registered model card.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Card defines purpose, owner, population, input features, output, limits, harms, thresholds, metrics, review date and permitted automation tier.
acceptance_evidence: Unregistered model/rule cannot be activated.

requirement: Input features shall come from an explicit allowlist with semantic definition and observation timestamp.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Protected or unnecessarily sensitive attributes are prohibited; derived proxies require review.
acceptance_evidence: Feature extraction tests validate type, missing-value and time-bound behavior.

requirement: Predictions shall persist model version, entity, prediction time, feature snapshot/hash, output, confidence, reasons and expiry.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A prediction is immutable; refresh creates a new record.
acceptance_evidence: Historical recommendation can be reproduced from stored artifact and features.

requirement: The system shall support rules-only, observation, recommendation and restricted-automation tiers.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Tier is per use case/model version and controls visibility/action permissions.
acceptance_evidence: Changing tier requires approval and is audited.

requirement: New models shall begin in observation mode.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Predictions are recorded and evaluated but do not alter customer treatment or staff priority.
acceptance_evidence: No action path references an observation-only output.

requirement: Recommendations shall include plain-language reason codes and supporting evidence links.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: At least one positive/negative reason is shown; raw coefficients may be available to administrators.
acceptance_evidence: 100% of surfaced recommendations meet explanation schema.

requirement: Low-confidence or out-of-distribution cases shall abstain.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Abstention creates no false precision and may route to human review.
acceptance_evidence: Test fixtures at confidence boundary return configured abstain state.

requirement: Staff feedback shall capture accepted, rejected, modified, wrong category, wrong priority, already handled, insufficient information and free-text rationale.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Feedback links to prediction and subsequent action.
acceptance_evidence: Feedback rate and disagreement are reportable by model/version/team.

requirement: Verified business outcomes shall be attached separately from staff preference feedback.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Outcomes include reply, conversion, win/loss, SLA, reopen, recovery, renewal/churn and completion.
acceptance_evidence: Evaluation distinguishes recommendation acceptance from actual result.

requirement: Training/evaluation datasets shall be time-sliced to prevent future-data leakage.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Features are materialized as known at prediction time; labels occur after a defined horizon.
acceptance_evidence: Automated leakage checks and sample inspection pass.

requirement: Candidate training shall require minimum data volume and class support.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Default: ≥200 eligible labeled examples and ≥30 per class for recommendation candidates; stricter auto-routing threshold is configurable.
acceptance_evidence: Insufficient data keeps rules primary and documents why.

requirement: Candidate evaluation shall use held-out chronological data and baseline comparison.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Metrics include precision, recall, macro-F1, calibration/error, abstention coverage and operational cost.
acceptance_evidence: Promotion report shows candidate versus current/rules baseline.

requirement: Restricted automatic routing shall require approved thresholds.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Default gate: macro-F1 ≥0.80 and severe-class recall ≥0.90 on sufficient held-out data, plus no unresolved safety regression.
acceptance_evidence: Promotion is blocked when any gate fails.

requirement: No high-impact action shall be executed solely from a model prediction.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No automatic deletion, customer suppression override, account closure, commercial commitment, refund, churn, sensitive disclosure or model-authored free text.
acceptance_evidence: Action allowlist tests reject prohibited uses.

requirement: Lead conversion scoring shall combine fit, completeness, recency and verified engagement with transparent reasons.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Score informs priority but never prevents human review or contact eligibility.
acceptance_evidence: Staff can compare score with historical outcome and correct features.

requirement: Customer health/risk scoring shall expose dimension-level reasons and avoid double-counting correlated signals.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Support, feedback, onboarding, engagement and commercial evidence use configurable recency/weights.
acceptance_evidence: Snapshot calculation is deterministic for rule fixtures.

requirement: Inbound intent classification shall support sales, pricing, support, complaint, cancellation risk, renewal, billing, praise and other.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: High-severity intents favor recall; low-confidence routes to general queue/human review.
