acceptance_evidence: Confusion matrix and severe miss review are available.

requirement: Duplicate detection shall be recommendation-only.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Candidate pair shows exact/fuzzy evidence and conflict risk; staff accepts, rejects or marks not duplicate.
acceptance_evidence: No model can merge records automatically.

requirement: Next-best-action shall select only from an approved action catalogue and respect mandatory obligations.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: SLA, consent, active recovery, due promises and workflow conflicts outrank predicted commercial action.
acceptance_evidence: A model recommendation cannot suppress a required service action.

requirement: Automated text support shall be limited to controlled template/block assembly.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No free-form generative customer message is produced; staff sees source blocks and may edit.
acceptance_evidence: Code and configuration contain no remote/local LLM inference path.

requirement: Model artifacts shall be signed/checksummed, immutable after activation and rollback-capable.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Activation stores artifact hash, code/feature versions and approver.
acceptance_evidence: Tampered artifact fails load and triggers system incident.

requirement: Training and batch scoring shall be bounded cron jobs with checkpoints.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Maximum rows/time/memory are configurable; candidate work yields to operational jobs.
acceptance_evidence: Interrupted job resumes safely and does not hold long database locks.

requirement: Drift and performance monitoring shall compare data distribution, confidence, abstention, disagreement and delayed outcomes.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Alert thresholds and review cadence are model-specific.
acceptance_evidence: Breached threshold can automatically demote to recommendation/observation or disable.

requirement: Model promotion, demotion and retirement shall require named accountable approval and complete audit.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No candidate auto-promotes after training; emergency disable is immediate.
acceptance_evidence: Governance report lists all active versions, tiers and review dates.

requirement: Dashboards shall be role- and scope-aware.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A user sees only authorized records and aggregates; counts do not leak restricted objects.
acceptance_evidence: Permission tests cover cards, charts, drilldowns and exports.

requirement: Every metric shall have a versioned definition, owner, source fields, time basis, filters and exclusion rules.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Definition is visible from the dashboard.
acceptance_evidence: Metric changes do not silently rewrite historical interpretation.

requirement: Dashboard aggregates shall drill to the exact authorized record set.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Filters are encoded in a saved-view definition rather than hidden SQL.
acceptance_evidence: Displayed count equals drilldown count for test datasets.

requirement: Operational dashboards shall prioritize exceptions and actions.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Sales, support, onboarding, success and automation views show overdue, blocked, unowned, at-risk and failed items.
acceptance_evidence: A manager can assign or open work from drilldown.

requirement: Lead reporting shall include source, response SLA, qualification, conversion, aging and disqualification reasons.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: First/last/converting source are distinct.
acceptance_evidence: Totals reconcile to lead events and exclude test/import-preview records.

requirement: Sales reporting shall include pipeline, stage velocity, forecast, win rate, slip, quote expiry, loss reasons and next-action compliance.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Value reports identify currency conversion source.
acceptance_evidence: Closed totals reconcile to immutable outcomes.

requirement: Onboarding reporting shall include handoff quality, time-to-first-value, milestone delay, blocker, completion and feedback.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Metrics are segmentable by template/product/version.
acceptance_evidence: Case drilldown validates aggregate.

requirement: Support reporting shall include backlog, first response, resolution, SLA, wait time, reopen, cause and satisfaction.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Automated acknowledgements are excluded from meaningful first response.
acceptance_evidence: Clock calculations reconcile to ticket intervals.

requirement: Customer-success reporting shall include health change, risk reasons, recovery, renewal, churn, retention and advocacy eligibility.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Manual overrides and computed health are distinguishable.
acceptance_evidence: Portfolio value reconciles to customer/renewal records.

requirement: Feedback reporting shall include response rate, distribution, themes, recovery time and unresolved low scores.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Anonymous/tiny cohorts follow privacy suppression rules.
acceptance_evidence: No anonymous response is drillable to an individual.

requirement: Automation reporting shall include enrolment, exit, completion, failure, reply, task completion, outcome and version comparison.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Causal claims are avoided unless an approved experiment design supports them.
acceptance_evidence: Report labels observed association versus controlled result.

requirement: AI reporting shall include model card, coverage, abstention, confidence, confusion matrix, severe misses, feedback, drift and outcome.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Metrics are per version and evaluation window.
acceptance_evidence: Promotion evidence is reproducible.

requirement: Data-quality reporting shall surface duplicate candidates, missing required fields, invalid contacts, stale records, orphan risks and retention exceptions.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Each rule has severity and owner.
acceptance_evidence: Resolution changes dashboard within aggregation interval.

requirement: System-health reporting shall show cron heartbeat, queue depth/age, dead letters, mailbox health, database size, file storage, inode estimate, errors and backup/restore status.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Thresholds create incidents and release blocks.
acceptance_evidence: Admin can drill to evidence without server shell access.

requirement: Exports shall be asynchronous, permissioned, time-limited and auditable.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Generated file is private, encrypted when policy requires and automatically expires.
acceptance_evidence: Direct export of unauthorized fields/records is impossible.

requirement: CSV exports shall neutralize spreadsheet formula injection and preserve data types.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Cells beginning with =, +, -, @ or tab are escaped according to export policy.
acceptance_evidence: Security test corpus opens safely in spreadsheet tools.

requirement: Scheduled summaries shall use internal email and contain minimal sensitive content.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Recipients, schedule and saved view are approved; full details remain behind login.
acceptance_evidence: Disabled user or changed permission is re-evaluated before send.

requirement: No administrator-facing raw SQL report builder shall be exposed.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Reports use defined query services/metrics and bounded filters.
acceptance_evidence: Configuration cannot execute SQL or arbitrary expressions.

requirement: The portal shall run within the same Django application and domain trust boundary.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Separate URL namespace, templates and authorization policies isolate customer views.
acceptance_evidence: No separate public service or API is required.

requirement: Portal access shall be invite-only or via signed single-purpose links.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Accounts bind to contact/organization; invites expire and are single-use.
acceptance_evidence: Uninvited public browsing exposes only approved forms/help.

requirement: Portal authorization shall enforce organization/contact scope on every query and mutation.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Server derives scope from session, never request-supplied organization ID.
acceptance_evidence: Comprehensive IDOR tests pass across files, tickets, onboarding and feedback.

requirement: Portal users shall view/update only approved contact/profile and preference fields.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Staff-controlled canonical/sensitive fields remain read-only or absent.
acceptance_evidence: Direct POST cannot modify restricted data.

requirement: Portal onboarding shall show requested items, due dates, instructions, progress and secure upload.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Customer can submit, revise while open and see acceptance/rejection reason.
acceptance_evidence: Submitted input creates timeline and owner notification.

requirement: Portal support shall allow ticket creation, conversation, status and permitted attachments.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Internal notes and restricted metadata are never rendered.
acceptance_evidence: Portal user cannot add comments to unrelated organization ticket.

requirement: Portal files shall use authenticated streamed download and safe headers.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No direct filesystem path is exposed; access/download is audited.
acceptance_evidence: Revoked permission immediately blocks cached application link.

requirement: Portal feedback shall support authenticated surveys and signed public survey links.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Response association and anonymity follow definition policy.
acceptance_evidence: Duplicate response behavior matches configured rule.

requirement: Portal notifications shall use approved email and in-app status; no push-service dependency.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Notification preference respects service versus optional classification.
acceptance_evidence: Missed email does not remove portal task visibility.

requirement: Portal pages shall be responsive, accessible and plain-language.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: WCAG 2.2 AA applicable checks, keyboard flow and 360px layouts pass.
acceptance_evidence: Customer can complete core flows without desktop-only interaction.

requirement: Portal sessions shall have stricter idle/absolute timeouts and secure recovery.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Sensitive actions may require re-authentication.
acceptance_evidence: Stolen/expired session fixtures are rejected.

requirement: Portal abuse controls shall rate-limit login, forms, uploads and message creation.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Limits are per IP/account/session with operational override and logging.
acceptance_evidence: Abuse tests cannot exhaust worker slots or create unlimited records.

requirement: Customer-visible state and wording shall be mapped from internal status deliberately.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Internal queue/risk labels are not exposed automatically.
acceptance_evidence: Configuration review lists every portal-visible status/message.

requirement: Portal maintenance/unavailability shall fail safely and provide company contact route.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No stack trace, internal path or host detail is shown.
acceptance_evidence: Error pages are branded, logged and accessible.

requirement: Company configuration shall include legal/display name, timezone, locale, currencies, business hours, holidays and contact details.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Changes are versioned/effective-dated where they affect calculations.
acceptance_evidence: Historical SLA/financial reports retain original basis.

requirement: Administrators shall configure teams, queues, roles and assignment rules with preview.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Changes show affected users/objects and require permission.
acceptance_evidence: Simulation fixtures match active routing.

requirement: Pipelines, stages, ticket categories, priorities, outcomes and reason dictionaries shall be governed reference data.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Values have code, label, meaning, order, active dates and replacement mapping.
acceptance_evidence: Used values retire rather than delete.

requirement: Communication templates and block libraries shall have draft/review/active/retired lifecycle.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Preview uses test context; activation records reviewer.
acceptance_evidence: No unapproved template is available to production automation.

requirement: Custom fields and forms shall be schema-validated and dependency-aware.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Retiring a field reports workflows, reports, imports and portal forms that reference it.
acceptance_evidence: Unsafe retirement is blocked.

requirement: SLA, frequency cap, quiet hour and escalation policies shall be centrally configured.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Policy precedence and effective time are explicit.
acceptance_evidence: Automated tests use exported policy fixture.

requirement: Feature flags shall be server-side, scoped and auditable.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Flags may disable risky capability but not bypass security/consent.
acceptance_evidence: Flag state is included in release/incident evidence.

requirement: Configuration import/export shall use signed/checksummed versioned bundles.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Secrets and environment-specific values are excluded.
acceptance_evidence: Tampered or incompatible bundle is rejected.

requirement: Production configuration changes shall support scheduled activation and rollback.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Change record includes reason, diff, reviewer and validation result.
acceptance_evidence: Rollback restores prior version for new behavior without erasing history.

requirement: Reference/configuration changes shall generate domain events only where explicitly safe.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Mass retroactive workflow effects require a separate queued migration.
acceptance_evidence: Editing a label does not unexpectedly contact customers.

requirement: Administrative diagnostics shall expose dependency/runtime versions and sanitized environment checks.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Secrets, filesystem internals and credentials are redacted.
acceptance_evidence: Support bundle is safe to share internally.

requirement: Default configuration shall be delivered as an opinionated company-ready baseline, not empty generic screens.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Initial roles, queues, stages, reasons, templates, SLAs and 28 production workflows are installed as drafts for company review.
acceptance_evidence: Configuration acceptance checklist records each approved/changed default.

requirement: Imports shall be staged before committed to canonical records.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Upload creates batch, schema mapping, validation results, duplicate candidates and preview; no automation runs.
acceptance_evidence: Preview can be discarded without business side effects.

requirement: CSV import shall detect encoding, delimiter and header safely with explicit confirmation.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Row/column/file-size limits protect resources.
acceptance_evidence: Malformed or oversized files fail with actionable report.

requirement: Import mapping shall support saved versioned mappings per source.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Transformations are allowlisted: trim, normalize, parse date/number, map dictionary and split known fields.
acceptance_evidence: No arbitrary script/formula execution.

requirement: Each imported row shall have an idempotency/source key.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Re-import updates/skips/creates according to declared policy and reports decision.
acceptance_evidence: Same batch cannot duplicate records.

requirement: Import commit shall run in bounded chunks and use transactions per safe unit.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Progress/checkpoint survives interruption; automation remains held until release.
acceptance_evidence: Failed chunk does not corrupt prior/next rows.

requirement: Imported records shall enter a quarantine/review state until approved release where configured.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Owner assignment, communication eligibility and source trust are reviewed.
acceptance_evidence: No customer message sends from unreleased import.

requirement: An import rollback shall reverse created changes where safe and report irreversible/conflicted effects.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Rollback uses batch provenance and preserves subsequent human edits.
acceptance_evidence: Dry-run shows exact proposed reversal.

requirement: Exports shall apply current authorization, field policy and purpose.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Requester selects defined dataset/view; high-risk export requires step-up/approval.
acceptance_evidence: Export audit contains criteria, row count, fields, file hash and expiry.

requirement: Data retention shall be policy-driven by record class, state and legal hold.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Policy supports active retention, archive, body/file separation and final purge.
acceptance_evidence: Dry-run report precedes destructive purge.

requirement: Archival shall reduce database/inode pressure while preserving authorized retrieval.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Old message bodies, detailed job logs and attachments may be compressed into indexed private archive packages.
acceptance_evidence: Checksum validation and retrieval tests pass.

requirement: Archive packages shall have manifest, checksums, record range, format version and encryption status.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No archive is deleted until manifest verification and retention decision.
acceptance_evidence: Corruption is detected by scheduled integrity check.

requirement: Database growth shall be measured by table/index and projected.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Threshold incidents identify top growth sources and required action.
acceptance_evidence: Deployment is blocked at configured 450 MB threshold.

requirement: Final purge shall respect relational dependencies and produce a signed/checksummed destruction report.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Purge removes or anonymizes according to policy and retains minimal lawful audit reference.
acceptance_evidence: Held/active-dependent records are skipped with reason.

requirement: Test/staging data shall be synthetic or appropriately anonymized.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Production export to staging is prohibited unless approved and transformed.
acceptance_evidence: Automated scan flags real customer identifiers in test fixtures.

requirement: Data migration scripts shall be versioned, repeatable and reconciled.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Each migration defines source counts, transforms, rejects, checksums and rollback/repair.
acceptance_evidence: Pre/post totals and sampled record evidence are signed off.

requirement: A versioned threat model shall be completed before implementation freeze and updated for material changes.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: It covers trust boundaries, assets, actors, abuse cases, mitigations and residual risk.
acceptance_evidence: Sponsor/technical owner sign-off and test mapping exist.

requirement: Production shall run only over valid HTTPS with canonical host enforcement.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: HTTP redirects to HTTPS; allowed hosts are explicit; forwarded-protocol handling is configured only for trusted proxy behavior.
acceptance_evidence: TLS/redirect/host-header tests pass.

requirement: Security headers shall include CSP, HSTS after validation, frame protection, nosniff, referrer policy and permissions policy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Policy is restrictive and report-only tested before enforcement.
acceptance_evidence: Automated header scan passes approved profile.

requirement: Session and authentication cookies shall be Secure, HttpOnly and appropriate SameSite.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Cookie names/prefixes and scope are environment-specific; no secret in URL.
acceptance_evidence: Browser and automated tests verify attributes.

requirement: All state-changing browser requests shall use CSRF protection and safe HTTP methods.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Exemptions require security review and signed-token alternative.
acceptance_evidence: CSRF test suite covers staff, portal and public token flows.

requirement: Output encoding and HTML sanitization shall prevent stored/reflected XSS.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Templates auto-escape; rich text uses strict allowlist; unsafe HTML/email content is not trusted.
acceptance_evidence: XSS corpus fails to execute in staff/portal views.

requirement: A Content Security Policy shall prevent unapproved script/style/frame sources.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Assets are local; inline allowances use nonce/hash only where required.
acceptance_evidence: No third-party runtime script is needed for core operation.

requirement: Database access shall use parameterized ORM/query APIs.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Raw SQL is isolated, reviewed and never constructed from user/configuration input.
acceptance_evidence: SAST/manual review and injection tests pass.

requirement: Object-level authorization shall be enforced server-side on every read, mutation, search, count, file and export.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Central policy/query services are used; identifiers never imply access.
acceptance_evidence: IDOR matrix tests cover each portal/staff object type.

requirement: Mass-assignment shall be prevented by explicit forms/field allowlists.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Client-supplied owner, role, organization, approval and restricted fields are ignored/rejected unless authorized.
acceptance_evidence: Tampered POST fixtures cannot elevate scope.

requirement: Public and authentication endpoints shall have database-backed rate limits and payload caps.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Limits consider IP, account, token, form and failure type; fail closed without exhausting DB.
acceptance_evidence: Abuse/load tests preserve availability and produce security events.

requirement: Public forms shall use honeypot, timing, duplicate and behavioral controls without relying on an external CAPTCHA.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Suspicious submissions may be quarantined and never trigger outbound mail automatically.
acceptance_evidence: Bot fixtures are blocked/limited; legitimate accessibility flow remains.

requirement: Signed links shall be purpose-bound, expiring, unguessable and revocable.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Stored token hashes are preferred; token cannot change target/object/action.
acceptance_evidence: Tamper, replay, cross-purpose and expiry tests pass.

requirement: Redirect targets shall be allowlisted/local to prevent open redirect.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Return/next parameters are validated.
acceptance_evidence: External scheme/host fixtures are rejected.

requirement: The application shall not perform arbitrary server-side URL fetching.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No configurable webhook, remote image import or URL preview exists; approved internal routes are explicit.
acceptance_evidence: SSRF test surface is absent or allowlisted.

requirement: No user/configuration input shall be executed by shell, Python eval, SQL engine or template expression engine.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Management commands use structured arguments; subprocess use, if any, is static and reviewed.
acceptance_evidence: Injection payloads cannot execute.

requirement: Serialization and uploaded configuration shall use safe formats and schemas.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: JSON/YAML safe loader only where required; no pickle/untrusted object deserialization.
acceptance_evidence: Malformed/tampered bundle is rejected.

requirement: Secrets shall be stored in cPanel environment variables or protected configuration outside source control/public root.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Keys are rotated through a documented process; diagnostics/logs redact them.
acceptance_evidence: Repository and support-bundle scans find no secret.

requirement: Database credentials shall use the least-privileged application user available.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Production credentials differ from staging/local and are not shared with staff accounts.
acceptance_evidence: Connection test confirms only required schema rights.

requirement: Selected restricted fields and exported backup artifacts shall support application-level authenticated encryption where runtime dependency passes preflight.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Encryption keys are separate from database dumps and rotated/versioned; highly sensitive secrets are never stored as CRM fields.
acceptance_evidence: Decrypt/rotation/failure tests pass; missing key fails closed.

requirement: File storage shall be outside the public web root and served through authorized application views.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Randomized names, safe Content-Disposition, nosniff and optional sandboxed PDF preview apply.
acceptance_evidence: Direct path and traversal tests fail.

requirement: File upload shall enforce allowlisted extensions/MIME signatures, size/count, decompression and filename safety.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Executables, scripts, HTML/SVG where unsafe, office macros and nested archives are rejected by default.
acceptance_evidence: Malicious/ambiguous corpus is withheld.

requirement: Because no external malware scanner is permitted, the product shall communicate and enforce the residual file-risk policy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No active content execution; staff downloads are explicit; high-risk file types remain blocked.
acceptance_evidence: Risk acceptance and user guidance are present.

requirement: Inbound email content shall be treated as untrusted.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Headers are parsed defensively, HTML sanitized, remote content disabled in preview, attachments validated and spoofing indicators shown where available.
acceptance_evidence: Crafted MIME fixtures do not execute or break parser.

requirement: Outbound email shall prevent header injection and unauthorized From/Reply-To use.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Addresses/subjects are validated; sender mailbox is allowlisted; CR/LF injection is rejected.
acceptance_evidence: Injection fixtures fail.

requirement: The company domain shall configure and monitor SPF, DKIM and DMARC to the extent supported by its Truehost mail/DNS setup.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Alignment/status is documented; failures do not silently authorize spoofed inbound identity.
acceptance_evidence: Pre-go-live DNS/mail checks are recorded.

requirement: Error handling shall never expose debug pages, secrets, SQL, filesystem paths or stack traces to users.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: DEBUG is false; branded error IDs map to internal logs.
acceptance_evidence: Production error-page tests pass.

requirement: Logs shall be structured, rotated and data-minimized.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Secrets, passwords, MFA seeds, full tokens, raw sensitive bodies and unnecessary PII are redacted.
acceptance_evidence: Log sampling/security tests verify redaction.

requirement: Sensitive business/admin events shall have tamper-evident audit chaining.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Events include previous/hash values or periodic checksum manifests; deletion requires exceptional controlled procedure.
acceptance_evidence: Verification command detects alteration/gap, acknowledging same-host limits.

requirement: Exports, merges, privacy operations, model promotion, role elevation and retention override shall require reason and enhanced audit.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: High-risk actions use step-up/four-eyes policy where configured.
acceptance_evidence: Audit evidence identifies requester, approver, scope and result.

requirement: Dependencies shall be pinned, inventoried and scanned before release.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Unsupported/vulnerable package blocks release unless approved mitigated exception exists.
acceptance_evidence: Release bundle contains SBOM/dependency list and review record.

requirement: Security patches shall follow severity-based remediation timelines.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Emergency patch path still includes backup, focused tests, deploy/rollback and post-check.
acceptance_evidence: Incident/release records show compliance.

requirement: Staging shall use separate database, secrets, mail interception and synthetic/anonymized data.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Production cookies/domains and credentials never operate in staging.
acceptance_evidence: Environment-isolation test passes.

requirement: Administrative/system-health endpoints shall require privileged auth and avoid disclosing host internals.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Public health response, if any, is minimal; detailed diagnostics are internal.
acceptance_evidence: Unauthenticated request receives no version/path/resource details.

requirement: Backup and restore artifacts shall be access-restricted, checksummed and encrypted for any offline copy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Restore process verifies integrity before import and rotates exposed credentials after compromise.
acceptance_evidence: Quarterly drill includes confidentiality/integrity checks.

requirement: A security incident runbook shall define detect, contain, preserve, notify, recover and review responsibilities.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Scenarios cover account takeover, data export, malicious upload, mail compromise, workflow runaway, model incident and host outage.
acceptance_evidence: Tabletop exercise passes before go-live.

requirement: Production acceptance shall include independent code review or penetration testing proportionate to the application.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: At minimum, authenticated/portal authorization, session, upload, injection, automation and export paths are tested.
acceptance_evidence: No unresolved critical/high issue; medium issues have approved disposition.

requirement: Routine authenticated list/detail pages shall achieve p95 server response ≤2.0 seconds and p99 ≤4.0 seconds under the defined 11-user load.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Excludes file downloads, queued report generation and provider outage.
acceptance_evidence: Load report with endpoint percentiles and error rate.

requirement: Routine create/update actions shall achieve p95 ≤2.5 seconds.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Actions persist domain/outbox events but do not execute bulk external effects inline.
acceptance_evidence: Transaction timing report on representative records.

requirement: Public forms and portal core pages shall achieve p95 ≤2.5 seconds under mixed load.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Rate limiting and validation remain enabled.
acceptance_evidence: Mixed anonymous/authenticated load test.

requirement: The application shall sustain 15 concurrent active sessions with <1% application error rate and no resource-limit failure.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Test includes search, lists, edits, portal and inbound/outbox cron contention.
acceptance_evidence: Capacity test; 20-session stress identifies safe failure behavior.

requirement: No HTTP endpoint shall perform unbounded bulk email, export, import, archive, model training or batch scoring.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Requests create bounded jobs and return status.
acceptance_evidence: Code review and execution-time fixtures.

requirement: Common detail pages shall meet a documented database query budget; N+1 queries are release defects.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Initial budgets: ≤35 queries for customer 360 overview and ≤25 for standard detail, unless approved evidence.
acceptance_evidence: Query-count tests and profiling.

requirement: Pagination is mandatory for potentially unbounded lists.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Default 25–50; maximum interactive page size 100; export uses jobs.
acceptance_evidence: Boundary tests on every list.

requirement: Search shall return first page p95 ≤2 seconds at capacity envelope.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Uses normalized indexed fields; broad/leading-wildcard queries are bounded.
acceptance_evidence: Search performance suite.

requirement: Due jobs shall normally begin within one configured cron interval plus two minutes.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: P95 measured excluding account/provider suspension; urgent mail/reply polling target five minutes.
acceptance_evidence: Job-latency dashboard and test.

requirement: A cron command shall process at most 50 jobs or 40 seconds by default.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: It checkpoints and exits cleanly; limits are configuration below host resource ceiling.
acceptance_evidence: Runner timing and interruption tests.

requirement: Database locks held by worker operations shall be short and bounded.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No user-visible table scan or long transaction; chunking and indexes apply.
acceptance_evidence: Slow-query/lock review on load test.

requirement: Application steady-state memory target shall remain ≤512 MB per process/job for representative operations.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: 1,024 MB is treated as host emergency ceiling, not normal budget.
acceptance_evidence: Process memory measurements.

requirement: Normal page transfer shall remain ≤1.5 MB compressed excluding explicit downloads.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Assets are locally cached and minimized.
acceptance_evidence: Browser network audit.

requirement: The application availability objective is 99.5% during periods when Truehost hosting, DNS, database and mail are available.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Internal heartbeat cannot independently prove provider-wide outage; limitation is reported.
acceptance_evidence: Monthly internal availability report and incident reconciliation.

requirement: Critical domain operations shall be atomic and idempotent.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Won handoff, merge, send intent, workflow enrolment, import chunk and transition cannot leave partial state.
acceptance_evidence: Crash/failure-injection tests.

requirement: Retryable operations shall converge without duplicate customer effect.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Unique idempotency constraints and final policy guards apply.
acceptance_evidence: Forced timeout/replay tests.

requirement: The system shall degrade safely when AI, reporting aggregates, IMAP or SMTP is unavailable.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Core record access/edit continues; outbound holds; clear incidents/tasks are created.
acceptance_evidence: Dependency failure scenarios.

requirement: Core customer records shall remain consistent after an abrupt worker/request termination.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Transactions, checkpoints and repair commands are documented.
acceptance_evidence: Kill/restart and integrity check.

requirement: Full recovery-point objective shall be ≤24 hours; a ≤6-hour critical-delta snapshot is targeted if resource tests pass.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Same-provider limits are acknowledged; snapshots include manifest/checksum.
acceptance_evidence: Backup timestamps and restore drill.

requirement: Recovery-time objective shall be ≤4 business hours after hosting access and a valid backup are available.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Provider restoration time is outside application control.
acceptance_evidence: Timed quarterly restore exercise.

requirement: No single backup shall be considered valid until readability, checksum and restore path are verified.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Existence/zero exit alone is insufficient.
acceptance_evidence: Backup verification record.

requirement: The interface shall conform to WCAG 2.2 AA for applicable user journeys.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Keyboard, focus, semantics, labels, errors, contrast, reflow and non-color meaning are tested.
acceptance_evidence: Automated scan plus manual checklist.

requirement: Core workflows shall work at 360 CSS-pixel viewport and 200% zoom without loss of function.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Tables may use accessible horizontal scrolling or card transformation.
acceptance_evidence: Responsive test evidence.

requirement: Supported browsers shall be current and previous major versions of Chrome, Edge, Firefox and Safari at release.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Graceful fallback applies where HTMX/JS enhancement is unavailable.
acceptance_evidence: Cross-browser test matrix.

requirement: Critical tasks shall be keyboard-operable with visible focus and logical order.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No mouse-only drag action is required; alternatives are provided.
acceptance_evidence: Manual keyboard test.

requirement: Customer-visible and staff error messages shall be plain, actionable and non-disclosing.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A correlation ID supports internal diagnosis.
acceptance_evidence: Content review and error fixtures.

requirement: Dates/times shall be stored in UTC and displayed in configured company/user timezone.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Business-calendar calculations use timezone-aware values and DST tests.
acceptance_evidence: Boundary test suite.

requirement: Money shall use decimal types, explicit currency and deterministic rounding.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No binary float for financial values.
acceptance_evidence: Unit/property tests.

requirement: The initial interface shall be English but user-visible strings, status labels and templates shall support future localization.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No concatenated grammar-dependent messages where avoidable.
acceptance_evidence: Internationalization extraction check.

requirement: Code shall use modular domain services, typed interfaces where valuable and documented invariants.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Django app boundaries avoid circular imports and hidden cross-module mutations.
acceptance_evidence: Architecture/lint review.

requirement: Automated tests shall cover domain rules, authorization, integrations, workflows, migrations and critical browser journeys.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Coverage percentage is secondary to risk mapping; every P0 requirement has tests.
acceptance_evidence: Requirement-to-test traceability.

requirement: Database migrations shall be backward-safe where practical, reviewed and tested on a copy-sized dataset.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Destructive changes use expand/migrate/contract or maintenance plan.
acceptance_evidence: Migration timing and rollback/repair evidence.

requirement: Releases shall be reproducible from version control and locked dependencies.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Release ID, commit, dependency lock, migration set and config bundle are recorded.
acceptance_evidence: Rebuild comparison and release manifest.

requirement: Operational commands shall provide structured summary, exit code and durable run record.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: They are safe to repeat and never rely solely on console output.
acceptance_evidence: Command contract tests.

requirement: Logs and health metrics shall be sufficient to diagnose request, mailbox, queue, workflow and data failures without exposing secrets.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Correlation IDs link layers; rotation protects storage.
acceptance_evidence: Incident simulation and log review.

requirement: Critical incidents shall appear in the admin work queue within one monitoring cron interval.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: When host/email is down, same-host alerting limitation is explicit.
acceptance_evidence: Synthetic incident test.

requirement: Database, filesystem and inode use shall be measured and thresholded.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Warnings at defined capacity values; critical blocks non-essential deployment/jobs.
acceptance_evidence: Capacity alert simulation.

requirement: The system shall support at least seven daily, four weekly and six monthly application/provider backup references where storage permits.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Retention reduces automatically only under documented capacity policy.
acceptance_evidence: Backup inventory view.

requirement: User-facing records shall preserve audit attribution through user disable, merge, archive and migration.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No orphan actor IDs or rewritten authorship.
acceptance_evidence: Referential integrity tests.

requirement: Administrative configuration and workflow changes shall be discoverable and reversible for new behavior.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Effective version and rollback path are visible.
acceptance_evidence: Configuration rollback exercise.

requirement: The product shall avoid runtime dependence on public CDNs, analytics, fonts, CAPTCHA, AI, queue or monitoring services.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Only Truehost web/database/mail/DNS and the user’s browser are required for core operation.
acceptance_evidence: Deployment network-dependency review.

requirement: All official operational procedures shall be executable by a trained administrator using cPanel and application UI/commands.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No undocumented VPS/root access is assumed.
acceptance_evidence: Runbook rehearsal by non-developer admin.

requirement: The application shall expose a version/build identifier and database/config compatibility status to authorized admins.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Customer-facing pages do not disclose stack versions.
acceptance_evidence: Release smoke test.

requirement: Archived records shall remain retrievable within 60 seconds for authorized single-record requests under normal load.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Large bulk restore is a queued operation.
acceptance_evidence: Archive retrieval test.

requirement: Staff onboarding shall allow a trained new user to complete core role journeys after documented training without developer assistance.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Role-specific guides and contextual help are included.
acceptance_evidence: UAT task-completion observation.

requirement: Production and staging shall be separate cPanel Python applications with separate databases, secrets, private files and mail behavior.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Staging remains low-traffic and mail-intercepted to protect shared resources.
acceptance_evidence: Isolation checklist and cross-environment credential test pass.

requirement: Production shall use Django production settings with DEBUG=False and deployment checks executed.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Startup refuses unsafe required settings.
acceptance_evidence: Automated `check --deploy` evidence stored per release.

requirement: Static assets shall be collected/versioned locally and served through approved cPanel web configuration.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No runtime npm build or CDN dependency.
acceptance_evidence: Release smoke test loads assets with cache-busting paths.

requirement: Database charset/collation shall support utf8mb4 and consistent comparison rules.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Migrations and connection options set explicitly.
acceptance_evidence: Unicode fixture tests pass.

requirement: Database connections shall be conservative and bounded.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Short persistent connection age may be used after test; no external pool; worker closes connections.
acceptance_evidence: Load test shows no connection exhaustion.

requirement: Cron commands shall use absolute virtual-environment/application paths and environment-specific settings.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Output is redirected to controlled logs; secrets never appear in command line.
acceptance_evidence: Manual run and scheduled run produce same result.

requirement: Cron schedules shall be staggered to avoid resource spikes.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Mail poll, outbox, due jobs, SLA checks, aggregates, backups and AI jobs do not begin together.
acceptance_evidence: Schedule review shows offsets and lock behavior.

requirement: Every scheduled command shall acquire a lease and exit safely if a prior instance remains active.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Stale lease threshold is command-specific and visible.
acceptance_evidence: Overlap simulation results in one active executor.

requirement: A release shall have immutable identifier, commit, dependency lock, config version and migration list.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Build identifier is visible to admins and logs.
acceptance_evidence: Release manifest archived.

requirement: Deployment shall use a documented maintenance and rollback procedure.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Backup, prechecks, code deploy, dependencies, collectstatic, migrations, restart, smoke and monitor are ordered.
acceptance_evidence: Rehearsal on staging passes.

requirement: Production code shall not be routinely edited through cPanel File Manager.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Changes originate in version control and a reviewed release artifact.
acceptance_evidence: Release history maps files to commit.

requirement: Database migrations shall run once under deployment lock.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Concurrent web/cron mutations are paused where incompatible.
acceptance_evidence: Migrations are timed and verified.

requirement: Rollback shall restore prior code/config and either backward-compatible schema or execute an approved repair plan.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Irreversible migrations require explicit backup/forward-fix plan before deploy.
acceptance_evidence: Rollback rehearsal covers representative release.

requirement: Passenger/application restart shall be verified by build identifier and health checks.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A restart touch alone is not acceptance.
acceptance_evidence: Post-deploy request shows new release and successful DB/mail/job checks.

requirement: Maintenance mode shall preserve a safe staff/customer message and block writes during incompatible operations.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Public forms do not accept data that cannot be committed; emergency contact route remains.
acceptance_evidence: Maintenance-mode tests pass.

requirement: Application logs shall rotate by size/time and retain only approved duration.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Log cleanup is independent from web requests and guarded by free-space threshold.
acceptance_evidence: Rotation/cleanup simulation preserves current logs.

requirement: System health shall record cron heartbeat, queue age/depth, mailbox status, DB/file/inode use, latest backup and error counts.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Admin dashboard uses thresholds and trend.
acceptance_evidence: Synthetic failure appears within monitoring interval.

requirement: Administrative health checks shall distinguish dependency unavailable, degraded and healthy.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A green status requires recent successful evidence, not absence of error.
acceptance_evidence: Stale evidence turns warning/critical.

requirement: Resource thresholds shall disable or defer non-essential jobs before hard host limits.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Model training, archive compaction and optional digests yield first; service mail and critical recovery retain priority.
acceptance_evidence: Capacity simulation verifies degradation order.

requirement: Provider daily backup shall be supplemented by application-managed logical backup/manifests.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Preferred DB export uses available cPanel/mysql tool; fallback is checkpointed application export.
acceptance_evidence: Preflight selects and tests one method.

requirement: Application backups shall include database, configuration bundle, private-file manifest, model/template/workflow versions and release manifest.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Secrets are excluded or separately protected.
acceptance_evidence: Restore inventory can identify compatible set.

requirement: Backup jobs shall be bounded and scheduled outside peak mail/automation periods.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: They monitor free space and abort safely before exhausting capacity.
acceptance_evidence: Representative backup stays within resource/time budget.

requirement: Backup retention shall enforce 7 daily, 4 weekly and 6 monthly where capacity permits.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Automatic pruning never removes the last verified restorable set.
acceptance_evidence: Inventory/prune tests pass.

requirement: A monthly encrypted offline copy is strongly recommended as a non-runtime governance exception.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: If the organization forbids all off-provider copies, sponsor signs correlated-failure risk acceptance.
acceptance_evidence: Decision recorded before go-live.

requirement: Restore shall be documented from both provider backup and application logical backup.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Procedure covers database, private files, config, release, keys, verification and DNS/app restart.
acceptance_evidence: Quarterly timed restore drill succeeds.

requirement: Restore verification shall reconcile record counts, checksums, critical invariants and sampled customer histories.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Login, portal isolation, send interception, job queue and files are tested before production release.
acceptance_evidence: Signed restore report stored.

requirement: Housekeeping shall remove expired temp files, exports, stale sessions, old logs and superseded archive staging.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Cleanup uses manifests/retention and never traverses unsafe user paths.
acceptance_evidence: Dry-run and execute results are visible.

requirement: Operations shall have severity definitions and named response owners.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: P0 security/data/duplicate-send/service outage; P1 major degraded function; P2 bounded defect; P3 minor.
acceptance_evidence: Runbook and response exercise completed.

requirement: A support bundle shall collect sanitized release, health, queue, configuration and recent error metadata.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: It excludes secrets and full customer content by default.
acceptance_evidence: Security review validates redaction.

requirement: Changes to hosting plan, Python/runtime, database engine, mail limits or cPanel capabilities shall trigger architecture compatibility review.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: The system does not assume provider settings remain unchanged indefinitely.
acceptance_evidence: Review checklist attached to change record.

requirement: A requirements traceability matrix shall map every P0/P1 requirement to design component, test case and acceptance result.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: The matrix is release-controlled and includes manual evidence where automation is inappropriate.
acceptance_evidence: No mandatory requirement remains unmapped.

requirement: Domain unit tests shall cover state transitions, invariants, calculations, policy precedence and idempotency.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Boundary and invalid cases are first-class.
acceptance_evidence: Critical domain rule mutation/branch review passes.

requirement: Integration tests shall use the same database engine family and transaction semantics as production.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: SQLite-only testing is insufficient for locks, constraints, collation and SQL behavior.
acceptance_evidence: MySQL/MariaDB integration suite passes.

requirement: Authorization tests shall cover role, record scope, field scope, direct URL, search, aggregate, export, file and background-job paths.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Portal cross-organization cases are exhaustive for exposed resources.
acceptance_evidence: No unauthorized data/count leakage.

requirement: Authentication tests shall cover invitation, MFA, recovery, lockout, session revocation, step-up and user deactivation.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Replay, expiry and enumeration cases included.
acceptance_evidence: Security acceptance suite passes.

requirement: Workflow contract tests shall cover every trigger, condition, action, exit and conflict type.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Event payload/version fixtures and transaction rollback are included.
acceptance_evidence: Engine contract suite passes.

requirement: Each of the 28 default workflows shall have positive, stop/exit, duplicate-event, retry and permission test cases.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Customer-facing message paths use intercepted mail.
acceptance_evidence: Workflow acceptance pack approved.

requirement: Idempotency/failure-injection tests shall interrupt processing before/after job claim, transaction commit and email handoff.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Tests prove one logical external effect or visible recoverable ambiguity.
acceptance_evidence: No silent duplicate-send path.

requirement: SMTP/IMAP integration tests shall use dedicated Truehost test mailboxes.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Threading, UID dedupe, reply stop, bounce-like messages, attachment validation and failure recovery are covered.
acceptance_evidence: Production-account preflight test passes without customer recipients.

requirement: Public form and portal tests shall cover rate limiting, token tampering, abuse, CSRF, upload and IDOR.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Accessible legitimate flows remain usable.
acceptance_evidence: Security and functional suites pass.

requirement: File tests shall include traversal, double extension, MIME mismatch, oversized payload, active content, unsafe filename and unauthorized download.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Residual no-malware-scanner policy is verified.
acceptance_evidence: Unsafe corpus blocked.

requirement: Data import tests shall cover encoding, mapping, duplicates, idempotency, chunk interruption, quarantine, release and rollback.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: No automation fires during preview/quarantine.
acceptance_evidence: Reconciliation matches source/result.

requirement: Export tests shall cover scope, approval, step-up, formula injection, expiration and audit.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Unauthorized/expired download fails.
acceptance_evidence: Export evidence complete.

requirement: Reporting tests shall reconcile aggregate, drilldown and event-derived metrics.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Time zone, business calendar, currency and version definitions are included.
acceptance_evidence: No unexplained discrepancy over approved tolerance.

requirement: AI tests shall cover feature time semantics, missing values, abstention, explanation, fallback, artifact checksum, promotion gate and drift.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Evaluation uses chronological holdout and severe-miss review.
acceptance_evidence: Model governance pack approved.

requirement: Performance tests shall use the Section 15 representative dataset and mixed workload.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Web, cron, DB, mail and file operations are measured under resource guards.
acceptance_evidence: All applicable NFR thresholds pass.

requirement: Soak tests shall run repeated cron/mail/job cycles long enough to reveal queue growth, leaks, lock accumulation and duplicate effects.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Resource trends and cleanup are observed.
acceptance_evidence: No unbounded trend at target load.

requirement: Accessibility tests shall combine automated scans with manual keyboard, zoom, screen-reader spot checks and error-flow review.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Staff and portal critical journeys covered.
acceptance_evidence: No unresolved critical/serious barrier.

requirement: Cross-browser/responsive tests shall cover the supported matrix and 360px viewport.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Core workflows and signed links included.
acceptance_evidence: Pass report with approved minor variances.

requirement: Backup tests shall verify creation, checksum, retention and readable contents.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: A backup that exists but cannot restore fails.
acceptance_evidence: Latest scheduled sets show verified status.

requirement: Restore tests shall rebuild a staging/recovery instance from a selected backup and execute integrity/smoke checks.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Timed RPO/RTO recorded.
acceptance_evidence: Quarterly drill meets targets or creates P0 remediation.

requirement: Migration tests shall run against a copy-sized source dataset multiple times.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Counts, rejects, duplicate resolution, checksums and performance are compared.
acceptance_evidence: Repeat run is idempotent/reconcilable.

requirement: Security testing shall include static review, dependency review and authenticated manual penetration testing.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: High-risk paths include portal, upload, export, automation config and admin.
acceptance_evidence: No unresolved critical/high issue.

requirement: Incident exercises shall cover mailbox outage, dead-letter surge, database near limit, compromised account, duplicate-send suspicion, restore and model incident.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Participants use production runbooks.
acceptance_evidence: Actions, gaps and remediation recorded.

requirement: User acceptance testing shall use role-specific business scenarios and production-like configuration.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: UAT is performed by business owners, not only developers.
acceptance_evidence: All critical scenarios accepted; defects dispositioned.

requirement: Deployment rehearsal shall execute the exact release and rollback procedure in staging.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Duration, commands, checks and owner handoffs recorded.
acceptance_evidence: No undocumented manual step remains.

requirement: Production smoke tests shall avoid real customer effect.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Test records/mailboxes and feature interception are used.
acceptance_evidence: Post-deploy checklist passes before automation resumes.

requirement: Defects shall have severity, affected requirement, reproduction, impact, owner and release decision.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Waivers require sponsor/technical owner and compensating control.
acceptance_evidence: No open release-blocking defect.

requirement: Test data shall be synthetic or anonymized and cleaned after defined retention.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Secrets/production identifiers are prohibited in fixtures.
acceptance_evidence: Data scan and cleanup evidence.

requirement: Test evidence shall be retained with the release manifest.
production_behavior_or_acceptance: Evidence includes logs/reports/screenshots/checksums without unnecessary customer data.
acceptance_evidence: Auditor can reproduce acceptance decision.
